Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The TextureId enumeration is an opaque token identifying a texture resource reflected from an IShaderProgram. It is used by IStateContainer implementations when binding or unbinding texture resources.

Note.Paragraph: ID values are renderer-generated tokens. Applications should obtain them from shader reflection methods rather than constructing arbitrary values.

EnumMemberList.EnumMemberListEntry: Indicates that no matching texture resource was found or that no texture binding slot is selected.
